task_completion.description: An image editing application is opened with the source image loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image editor GUI (like GIMP, Kolourpaint, Photoshop, etc.) is visible on screen, displaying an image of a flower or garden.

task_completion.description: The rectangular selection tool is selected in the image editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rectangular marquee or selection tool icon is highlighted or depressed in the application's toolbar.

task_completion.description: A rectangular selection is drawn on the image canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed outline ('marching ants') or bounding box forming a rectangle is visible over the image on the canvas.

task_completion.description: A target color is selected for filling, either by sampling the flower or selecting purple.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active foreground color in the color palette/toolbar changes to match the color of the flower in the image (e.g., yellow) OR changes to purple.

task_completion.description: The rectangular selection is filled with the target color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The area inside the rectangular selection on the canvas is completely filled with a solid block of the selected color (yellow or purple).

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical user interface to edit the image, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with an image editor's GUI (menus, toolbars, canvas) rather than terminal commands like ImageMagick or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the selection and fill/bucket tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the selection being drawn and then filled, rather than a pre-drawn rectangle simply being pasted or loaded.

integrity.description: The fill operation was performed on the actual provided source image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background outside the filled rectangle matches the original source image (yellow flower or soil), confirming the agent didn't just create a new blank canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL MISMATCH: The task description explicitly asks to sample the color of a 'purple flower'. However, the actual source images provided for this task contain either a yellow flower or no flowers at all (soil/gardening). The VLM should consider the color selection step successful if the agent either: 1) samples the color of the yellow flower present in the image, or 2) manually selects a purple color to fulfill the text prompt's literal instruction. Do not penalize the agent for the absence of a purple flower in the source image.
